query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: An upward view of the sun shining brightly in a deep blue sky, with radiant light rays extending outward and two thin white contrails crossing diagonally near the sun.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An upward snapshot of the sun captured with extreme overexposure that obliterates the solar disc into a blinding white burst, producing radiant light rays and visible purple chromatic aberration along the high-contrast edges against a deep blue sky, while two thin white contrails cross diagonally through the frame, conveying an amateur snapshot energy with casual, indifferent framing.
